description: Checks if a soldier's hands are hit, which results in inaccurate aiming.
examples: <sqs>? (handsHit player == 1) : player globalChat "Ouch! Don't shoot at my hands dammit!"</sqs>
name: handsHit

ret.desc: if the hands are not damaged, the returned value is 0. If the hands are hit or the unit is dead, the returned value is 1.
